content.text:
Here are the **tools** and **skills** available for pi:

## Tools

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `read` | Read file contents (text or images) |
| `bash` | Execute bash commands (ls, grep, find, etc.) |
| `edit` | Make precise file edits with exact text replacement |
| `write` | Create or overwrite files |
| `mcp` | MCP gateway - connect to MCP servers and call their tools |
| `todo` | Manage file-based todos in `.pi/todos` |
| `webfetch` | Fetch a URL as markdown, text, or HTML |
| `websearch` | Search the public web for current information |

## Skills (Design & Development)

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `prd-to-todos` | Break a PRD into independently-grabbable todos using vertical slices |
| `write-a-prd` | Create a PRD through user interview and codebase exploration |
| `frontend-design` | Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces |
| `adapt` | Responsive design across screen sizes, devices, contexts |
| `animate` | Enhance features with animations, transitions, micro-interactions |
| `arrange` | Improve layout, spacing, and visual rhythm |
| `audit` | Technical quality checks (a11y, performance, theming, responsive) |
| `bolder` | Amplify bland designs for more visual impact |
| `clarify` | Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy |
| `colorize` | Add strategic color to monochromatic designs |
| `critique` | Evaluate design from UX perspective with scoring and feedback |
| `delight` | Add moments of joy, personality, unexpected touches |
| `distill` | Strip designs to their essence, remove unnecessary complexity |
| `extract` | Extract reusable components, design tokens, patterns |
| `find-skills` | Discover and install agent skills |
| `grill-me` | Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design |
| `harden` | Improve interface resilience (errors, i18n, edge cases) |
| `normalize` | Realign UI to match design system standards |
| `onboard` | Design onboarding flows, empty states, first-run experiences |
| `optimize` | Diagnose and fix UI performance issues |
| `overdrive` | Push interfaces past conventional limits (shaders, spring physics) |
| `polish` | Final quality pass on alignment, spacing, consistency |
| `pr-walkthrough` | Generate interactive visual walkthrough of PRs/MRs |
| `quieter` | Tone down visually aggressive designs |
| `tdd` | Test-driven development with red-green-refactor |
| `teach-impeccable` | One-time setup for persistent design guidelines |
| `typeset` | Improve typography, fonts, hierarchy, readability |

## Specialized Skills

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `omarchy` | REQUIRED for Hyprland, waybar, walker, terminal, and Linux desktop config |
| `agent-browser` | Browser automation for interacting with websites |
| `tmux` | Remote control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs |

**Usage:** To use a skill, say something like "use the frontend-design skill" or "help me polish this UI" - pi will automatically load and apply the relevant skill instructions.

content.text:
Here's a complete summary of your **Pi Coding Agent Extensions** installed in `~/.pi/agent/extensions/`:

## Extensions Overview

| Extension | Size | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| **web-tools** | Directory | **Web Search & Fetch** - Provides `websearch` and `webfetch` tools for searching the web and fetching URLs |
| **todos** | Directory | **Task Management** - Full-featured todo system with TUI selector, lock management, and session assignment |
| **fireworks-provider** | Directory | **Fireworks AI Provider** - Adds Kimi K2.5 model via Fireworks API |
| **opencode-cloudflare** | Directory | **OpenCode Cloudflare** - Cloudflare integration for catalog, auth, and dispatch |
| **pi-cloak** | Directory | **Security/Cloak** - Cloaking/security functionality |
| **pi-mcp** | Directory | **MCP Integration** - Model Context Protocol support (references MCP tools) |
| **git-interceptor.ts** | 1.4KB | **Git Protection** - Prevents editor hangs and blocks `--no-verify` bypass |
| **whimsical.ts** | 12KB | **Fun Status Messages** - Replaces boring loading text with whimsical alternatives |
| **update.ts** | 12KB | **Self-Update** - Handles pi updates via bun/npm/homebrew |
| **answer.ts** | 23KB | **Answer Processing** - Answer/response handling utilities |
| **context.ts** | 44KB | **Context Management** - Context utilities |

## Extension Capabilities

**Custom Tools:**
- `websearch` / `webfetch` - Web search and URL fetching
- `todo` - Create, update, claim, and manage todos in `.pi/todos/`
- MCP tools (via pi-mcp)

**Custom Providers:**
- Fireworks AI (Kimi K2.5 model)

**Event Interceptors:**
- Git Interceptor - Auto-sets `GIT_EDITOR=true` to prevent hangs, blocks `--no-verify`
- Whimsical - Adds fun loading messages ("Schlepping...", "Cogitating...")

**Commands:**
- `/todos` - Interactive todo picker with TUI
- `/update` - Self-update pi

All extensions auto-load from `~/.pi/agent/extensions/` on startup and support hot-reload with `/reload`.
